## Meeting Purpose

[Explore GrowthX's AI-assisted content creation capabilities and potential partnership with 7shifts for SEO and content marketing.](https://fathom.video/share/9qjqZzVPun99BAyCGgEM16_6b5S1F8uG?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX uses AI-assisted workflows to dramatically increase content production efficiency (10-15x) while maintaining quality](https://fathom.video/share/9qjqZzVPun99BAyCGgEM16_6b5S1F8uG?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
  - [Typical results include significant traffic growth by month 3, with some clients seeing 100%+ year-over-year growth](https://fathom.video/share/9qjqZzVPun99BAyCGgEM16_6b5S1F8uG?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [GrowthX can integrate with existing content teams in various ways, from owning entire content buckets to supporting human-led efforts](https://fathom.video/share/9qjqZzVPun99BAyCGgEM16_6b5S1F8uG?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
  - [Key success factors include client capacity for early feedback and patience in seeing results (typically 3-6 months)](https://fathom.video/share/9qjqZzVPun99BAyCGgEM16_6b5S1F8uG?tab=summary&timestamp=1218.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's AI-Assisted Content Creation Process

  - [Uses AI workflows for keyword research, competitor analysis, and content generation](https://fathom.video/share/9qjqZzVPun99BAyCGgEM16_6b5S1F8uG?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [Human editors provide oversight and quality control throughout the process](https://fathom.video/share/9qjqZzVPun99BAyCGgEM16_6b5S1F8uG?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
  - [Can produce 10-20 high-quality articles per week per content professional](https://fathom.video/share/9qjqZzVPun99BAyCGgEM16_6b5S1F8uG?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
  - [Focuses on creating content that serves user intent and provides a good experience](https://fathom.video/share/9qjqZzVPun99BAyCGgEM16_6b5S1F8uG?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)

### Content Performance and Metrics

  - [Typically sees significant traffic growth by month 3 (e.g., 50 to 250+ clicks/week)](https://fathom.video/share/9qjqZzVPun99BAyCGgEM16_6b5S1F8uG?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Uses tools like SEO testing to track performance of refreshed content](https://fathom.video/share/9qjqZzVPun99BAyCGgEM16_6b5S1F8uG?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Can integrate with client analytics to track conversions and influence on other channels](https://fathom.video/share/9qjqZzVPun99BAyCGgEM16_6b5S1F8uG?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)
  - [Aims for 80-85% of traffic coming through blog content they've published](https://fathom.video/share/9qjqZzVPun99BAyCGgEM16_6b5S1F8uG?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)

### Integration with Client Teams

  - [Flexible approach to working with existing content teams](https://fathom.video/share/9qjqZzVPun99BAyCGgEM16_6b5S1F8uG?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
  - [Can own entire content buckets or support human-led efforts (e.g., creating cluster content around pillar pages)](https://fathom.video/share/9qjqZzVPun99BAyCGgEM16_6b5S1F8uG?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
  - [Leverages client-produced content (e.g., podcasts, webinars) to create additional written pieces](https://fathom.video/share/9qjqZzVPun99BAyCGgEM16_6b5S1F8uG?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)
  - [Emphasizes transparency and alignment with client goals and strategies](https://fathom.video/share/9qjqZzVPun99BAyCGgEM16_6b5S1F8uG?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)

### Technical Integration and Workflow

  - [Currently publishes content manually for most clients](https://fathom.video/share/9qjqZzVPun99BAyCGgEM16_6b5S1F8uG?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
  - [Working on developing integrations for automated publishing to client CMSs](https://fathom.video/share/9qjqZzVPun99BAyCGgEM16_6b5S1F8uG?tab=summary&timestamp=2284.0)
  - [Can work with various CMS setups, including headless WordPress with Next.js and GraphQL](https://fathom.video/share/9qjqZzVPun99BAyCGgEM16_6b5S1F8uG?tab=summary&timestamp=2267.0)

### Challenges and Considerations

  - [Finding the right quality bar for highly technical or niche content](https://fathom.video/share/9qjqZzVPun99BAyCGgEM16_6b5S1F8uG?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Balancing speed and scale with maintaining content quality](https://fathom.video/share/9qjqZzVPun99BAyCGgEM16_6b5S1F8uG?tab=summary&timestamp=1349.0)
  - [Importance of client capacity for reviewing and providing feedback on early content](https://fathom.video/share/9qjqZzVPun99BAyCGgEM16_6b5S1F8uG?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)
  - [Managing expectations for timeline of results (typically 3-6 months for significant impact)](https://fathom.video/share/9qjqZzVPun99BAyCGgEM16_6b5S1F8uG?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

## Next Steps

  - [7shifts team to regroup internally and compile follow-up questions](https://fathom.video/share/9qjqZzVPun99BAyCGgEM16_6b5S1F8uG?tab=summary&timestamp=3631.0)
  - [Libby to add GrowthX team to 7shifts Slack for further discussion](https://fathom.video/share/9qjqZzVPun99BAyCGgEM16_6b5S1F8uG?tab=summary&timestamp=3640.0)
  - [Explore potential integration points between GrowthX's capabilities and 7shifts' existing content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/9qjqZzVPun99BAyCGgEM16_6b5S1F8uG?tab=summary&timestamp=3640.0)
  - [Consider GrowthX's ability to support 7shifts' specific content needs and technical setup](https://fathom.video/share/9qjqZzVPun99BAyCGgEM16_6b5S1F8uG?tab=summary&timestamp=3652.0)
